name: Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the diced bacon until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon, leaving 2 tablespoons of grease in the pan.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook briefly until it softens somewhat.
3. Add the diced potatoes and toss to coat them evenly.
4. Add the chicken bouillon cubes and water to cover the potatoes by about half to one inch. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low.
6. Continue cooking until the potatoes begin to break apart when poked with a fork.
7. Stir occasionally to dissolve the bouillon and prevent burning.
8. When the potatoes are tender enough to mash easily, add milk gradually until you achieve your desired consistency (smooth or chunky).
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Warm through, stirring constantly before removing from heat.
